title: LR92 - Entrance Antiphon
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Receive the joy of your glory, Giving thanks to God, Who has called you into the heav'nly kingdom, Alleluia, Alleluia.

title: Ps 118:2-4, 13-15, 22-24
author: Owen Alstott
snippet: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, his love is everlasting.

title: Gospel Acclamation
author: Josh Blakesley/Spirit & Psalm
snippet: You believe in me, Thomas, because you have seen me, says the Lord; Blessed are those who have not seen me, but still believe!

title: Give Us Your Peace
author: Jesse Manibusan/Sarah Hart
snippet: Give us your peace, O God; give us your peace, your peace. Give us your peace, O God; give us your peace, your peace.

title: LR-93
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Bring your hand and feel the place of the nails, And do not be unbelieving but believing, Alleluia, Alleluia.

title: In the Breaking of the Bread
author: Timothy R. Smith
snippet: In the breaking of the bread, we knew him, Lord Jesus. Alleluia! Alleluia!

title: Lead me to the Cross
author: Suno xJim Ngo
snippet: Savior, I come to You now Quiet my soul to remember Redemption’s hill where love was found You paid the price for my ransom

title: He is Risen
author: Suno xJim Ngo
snippet: Christ the Lord is risen to-day Sons of men and an-gels say Raise your joys and triumphs high Sing you heavens and earth re-ply

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
